name: Duncan McDowell
abilities: ★ The Illusionist — conjured the app, the leaderboard, the Grint engine, and the very deck you're holding. His finest illusion, though, is the one where he's any good at golf.
The Long Con. Behind the smoke, genuinely the field's most-improved — handicap 22 → 13, net '22 · 14th → '25 · 5th. Lately retired from foot races — a perfect 0–1.
flavor: “I'm an attractive, fit, successful man — quite possibly the most interesting thing to happen to Bayfield since 'rockman,' or that alien craft from two years ago that definitely wasn't just two sailboats.”
caption: Duncan McDowell · Truffle Hogs 🐗
